title: Chef Ed's Sweet Turkey Bowl
description: My take on Chef Ed's submitted bowl idea featuring seasoned ground meat, roasted sweet potato, avocado, cottage cheese, Tajín, and lime.
ingredients: 1 pound ground turkey or ground pork
3 large sweet potatoes, microwaved briefly, cubed, and roasted
1 lime, for squeezing over the bowl
Oil, for roasting the sweet potato
Garlic powder or garlic salt, to taste
steps: Microwave the sweet potato for a few minutes to soften it slightly.
Toss the sweet potato cubes with oil, garlic salt, and pepper.
Roast at 450°F for about 20 minutes, or until browned and tender.
While the sweet potato roasts, dice the onion and saute it in a pan until softened.
Add the ground turkey or ground pork to the pan.
Season the meat with chili powder, garlic powder or garlic salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper.
Cook until the meat is fully cooked through.
Build the bowl with the seasoned meat, roasted sweet potato, chopped avocado, and a dollop of cottage cheese.
Finish with a generous dash of Tajín and a squeeze of lime.
notes: Edgar sent me a simple, straightforward, healthy dinner recipe that of course I made much more complex. A perfect example of how little detail I need to mess up your submitted recipe and take it in a whole new direction! My final rating: 9/10.
